positive: A whimsical, stylized jungle cat (like a leopard or jaguar) silhouette leaping through a lush, vibrant exotic floral environment. The scene should feature bold, clean lines, strong contrast, and intricate negative space. Focus on symmetrical composition and central placement of the main action. Use a color palette of deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and fiery sunset oranges against a creamy, pale background. The overall aesthetic should be highly detailed, vector-art inspired, and suitable for screen printing on fabric. Incorporate stylized tropical leaves, exotic flowers (like giant heliconia or orchids), and hanging vines in a clean, illustrative manner. High saturation, maximalist design feel, excellent detail, graphic novel style.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, ugly, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low resolution, cartoon, photorealism, faded
